[Pick Up Recruitment Preview]

A new Pick Up Recruitment will begin on 7/26 (Tue)!
Target Pick Up Student: 3★ Nodoka (Hot Spring)

Pick Up Recruitment Period: 7/26 (Tue) After Maintenance – 8/9 (Tue) 03:00 (UTC) Before Maintenance![f30ImXgRgrnElwDlUmph9yBSIRy5s63R.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/f30ImXgRgrnElwDlUmph9yBSIRy5s63R.jpg)
